commands.review_summary:
The PR batches durable `.usage-cost-cache.json` rewrites during stale-session refreshes, skips no-op refresh writes, and adds a runtime proof script plus regression coverage.

PR surface: Source +27, Tests +72, Other +114. Total +213 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection gives a high-confidence reproduction path: on current main, any refresh with many stale usage-counted session files calls `writeUsageCostCache` once per stale file plus a final write. I did not run the workload locally because this review is read-only, but the loop behavior is explicit in source.
